'''Winslau Da'k''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] that was once a [[Padawan/Legends|student]] of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Winslau Da'k's Jedi Master|Master]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Da'k was lost to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] after an encounter with [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and he imprisoned his old [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] in a fortress on the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] world of [[Morcanth]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Winslau Da'k was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by a [[Winslau Da'k's Jedi Master|Jedi Master]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|student]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="SWGS" />

At the conclusion of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the implementation of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] killed the majority of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and effectively disbanded the Jedi Order.<ref name="RotS">[[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' comic adaptation]]</ref> At some point afterward, Da'k encountered [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who corrupted him to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] unbeknownst to Da'k's master. The corrupted student surprised and overcame his master, and imprisoned him in an underground base on [[Morcanth]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located deep in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] in disputed space between three local warring [[Species/Legends|species]]. Da'k lived a life of wealth and comfort in his fortress, which was also inhabited by a small entourage of servants and guards. The power-mad student incessantly assaulted the old [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who had trained him, attempting to attain mastery over the man and gain knowledge before destroying him.<ref name="SWGS" />

Weakened by his student's assaults and desperate, Da'k's Master used the last of his diminishing power to reach out across space for help, touching the minds of a group of Force-sensitive individuals who experienced visions and [[Dream/Legends|dreams]] of him beckoning to them from Morcanth. Morcanth had been renamed on modern [[Star map/Legends|star-charts]], and was thus a mystery to the group until they uncovered old charts that used the name. Upon journeying there, the group evaded the three warring races, neutralized Da'k's bevy of guards, and finally overcame Winslau Da'k himself, freeing the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi's]] former master.<ref name="SWGS" />
